nasb.text: Then from there he went against the inhabitants of Debir (now the name of Debir formerly was Kiriath-sepher).

esv.text: From there they went against the inhabitants of Debir. The name of Debir was formerly Kiriath-sepher.

cnv.text: 他們從那裡又去攻擊底璧的居民；底璧從前名叫基列．西弗。

ccb.text: 他们从那里出兵攻打底璧，那里从前叫基列·西弗。
